heading: Service credit: regular enlisted members; service as an officer to be counted as enlisted service
label: 9252 Service credit: regular enlisted members; service as an officer to be counted as enlisted service
text: An enlisted member of the Regular Air Force or the Space Force is entitled to count active service as an officer in the Air Force, in the Space Force, and in the Army, as enlisted service for all purposes.
